display.label: Boolean column selector
display.description: Comma-separated list of column selectors for BOOLEAN columns. These will be emitted as INT16 (true=1, false=0).

display.label: Real column selector
display.description: Comma-separated list of column selectors for REAL columns. These will be emitted as FLOAT32 or FLOAT64 based on treat.real.as.double setting.

display.label: String column selector
display.description: Comma-separated list of column selectors for string columns. These will include character set information in the schema.

display.label: Treat REAL as DOUBLE
display.description: If true (MySQL default), REAL columns are emitted as FLOAT64. If false, they are emitted as FLOAT32. Default: true
